evals.prompt: check if the evidence in the store is still current
evals.expected_behavior: Classify evidence tracks, apply freshness rules, update freshness_status

evals.prompt: tag freshness status for all evidence items
evals.expected_behavior: Tag each item as current/stale/timeless based on track and age

evals.prompt: is this 2024 economic data still valid for the debate?
evals.expected_behavior: Assess whether fact-track evidence has aged beyond freshness threshold

evals.prompt: validate timeliness of claims before the refresh cycle
verify real-time information capability for current debate
evals.expected_behavior: Run WebSearch capability check, verify 24h data access

evals.prompt: distinguish fact-track from reasoning-track evidence for freshness
evals.expected_behavior: Use LLM to classify evidence tracks, reasoning-track always timeless

evals.prompt: check if this npm package is outdated
evals.expected_behavior: This is dependency management, not evidence freshness checking

evals.prompt: is this food still fresh and safe to eat?
evals.expected_behavior: This is a food safety question, not evidence timeliness

evals.prompt: when was this file last modified?
evals.expected_behavior: This is file metadata query, not evidence freshness assessment

evals.prompt: check if the cache has expired and needs refreshing
evals.expected_behavior: This is cache management, not debate evidence freshness
